name: Lime Velvet Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in boiling water.
2. Add chunks of cream cheese. Beat at medium speed until well blended.
3. Chill until slightly congealed.
4. Add pineapple, celery and nuts. Fold in whipped cream.
5. Pour into a 3 cup mold and let set.
6. Turn out onto a lettuce leaf and garnish with cherries if desired.
